title: No copyright in political campaign idea: Patna High Court quashes FIR against Prashant Kishor
description: The Patna High Court has quashed a criminal case against political strategist Prashant Kishor over allegations that he had stolen data and campaign material for his “Baat Bihar Ki” political campaign [Prashant Kishor Vs State of Bihar].Justice Sandeep Kumar held that the allegations, even if taken at face value, did not make out offences of forgery, cheating or criminal conspiracy under the Indian Penal Code (IPC)."It is already crystallised that there can be no copyright in an idea, subject mat
